codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly recharacterized the exchange-rate expectation in `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts` to assert the intended contract (BTC base = 1, positive finite USD conversion, numeric EUR) instead of a hardcoded fixture value of 90,000. The change is minimal and targeted - only 2 lines changed in one file. Verification shows all three relevant test suites (app.test.ts, compare-coingecko.test.ts, integration-live-data.test.ts) pass, and typecheck completes without errors.

summary: Feature implementation passes scrutiny. The worker characterized the shared conversion-rate payloads across app, compare, and live-data test suites, identified that the hardcoded USD value (90,000) in integration-live-data.test.ts was inconsistent with the contract (which guarantees BTC base + finite fiat conversions), and updated the test to assert the intended contract. The change preserves existing passing coverage in app.test.ts (84 tests) and compare-coingecko.test.ts (50 tests) while fixing the live-data integration test. The worker followed the compatibility-hardening-worker skill procedure correctly, and no shared state gaps were identified.
